heroHeadline: 80 Years of the Kim Dynasty: DPRK Deploys Troops to Russia, Ends Reunification Goal
heroSubtitle: Nuclear-armed North Korea deepens Russia alliance while Kim Jong-un constitutionally ends Korean reunification and deploys ~12,000 troops to fight in Ukraine
footerNote: Data sourced from US/ROK official reports, KCNA, UN panels, IAEA, and institutional analyses. North Korea does not publish national statistics — economic figures are estimates with wide uncertainty ranges.
